mapper.select: SELECT bi.project_id, bi.project_name, bi.proposed_amount AS budget_amount, bi.allocated_amount, COALESCE(fp.paid_total, 0) AS paid_amount, (bi.allocated_amount - COALESCE(fp.paid_total, 0)) AS deviation_amount, CASE WHEN bi.allocated_amount > 0 THEN ROUND(((bi.allocated_amount - COALESCE(fp.paid_total, 0)) / bi.allocated_amount) * 100, 2) ELSE 0 END AS deviation_rate, CASE WHEN bi.allocated_amount > 0 THEN ROUND((COALESCE(fp.paid_total, 0) / bi.allocated_amount) * 100, 2) ELSE 0 END AS execution_rate FROM invest_budget_item bi LEFT JOIN invest_fund_plan fp ON bi.budget_item_id = fp.budget_item_id WHERE bi.budget_id = #{budgetId} ORDER BY bi.order_num

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(p.pay_date, '%Y-%m') AS month, 0 AS budget_amount, SUM(p.paid_amount) AS actual_amount, 0 AS execution_rate FROM invest_fund_payment p WHERE p.pay_status = '3' AND p.project_id IN ( SELECT bi.project_id FROM invest_budget_item bi WHERE bi.budget_id = #{budgetId} ) AND p.pay_date >= #{startDate} AND p.pay_date <= #{endDate} GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(p.pay_date, '%Y-%m') ORDER BY month

SELECT b.budget_id, b.budget_code, b.budget_name, b.plan_year, ps.scheme_name, b.total_budget, b.allocated_amount, COALESCE(fp.paid_total, 0) AS actual_paid, (b.allocated_amount - COALESCE(fp.paid_total, 0)) AS deviation_amount, CASE WHEN b.allocated_amount > 0 THEN ROUND((COALESCE(fp.paid_total, 0) / b.allocated_amount) * 100, 2) ELSE 0 END AS execution_rate, b.budget_status FROM invest_budget b LEFT JOIN invest_fund_plan fp ON b.budget_id = fp.budget_id LEFT JOIN plan_scheme ps ON b.scheme_id = ps.scheme_id WHERE b.budget_id = #{budgetId} AND b.del_flag = '0'

SELECT p.dept_name AS deptName, COUNT(DISTINCT bi.budget_id) AS budgetCount, COALESCE(SUM(bi.allocated_amount),0) AS allocatedAmount, COALESCE(SUM(fp.paid_total),0) AS actualPaid, (COALESCE(SUM(bi.allocated_amount),0) - COALESCE(SUM(fp.paid_total),0)) AS deviationAmount, CASE WHEN COALESCE(SUM(bi.allocated_amount),0) > 0 THEN ROUND((COALESCE(SUM(fp.paid_total),0) / COALESCE(SUM(bi.allocated_amount),0)) * 100, 2) ELSE 0 END AS executionRate FROM invest_budget_item bi LEFT JOIN invest_fund_plan fp ON bi.budget_item_id = fp.budget_item_id LEFT JOIN invest_project p ON bi.project_id = p.project_id WHERE bi.budget_id IN (SELECT budget_id FROM invest_budget WHERE del_flag='0' AND budget_status IN ('2','3')) GROUP BY p.dept_name ORDER BY deviationAmount DESC
